vlm_note: read_board_stable is highly flaky on this frame (fails most attempts) and the recovered fit is OFFSET/inconsistent: the black top-right settlement visually borders {BRICK,ORE,WOOD} (brick-8, ore, tree - matching jpeanu's grant {BRICK,ORE,WOOD}=v10/v11) but the fit places its marker at v30, whose topology is only {BRICK,WOOD}. Bottom region (v23 purple, v20 black, v19 junction) fit correctly, so the fit is internally inconsistent. Recoverable via a clean board re-parse.
